weak.task_service_logic: Implements only a happy path and skips invalid input checks.
weak.task_architecture_note: Provides a short overview without discussing trade-offs.

medium.task_service_logic: Covers baseline logic and some invalid inputs, but misses timeout/retry handling.
medium.task_architecture_note: Describes components and mentions one trade-off with limited depth.

strong.task_service_logic: Implements complete flow, validates input, and includes deterministic retry limits.
strong.task_architecture_note: Explains boundaries, scaling limits, and reasons about reliability trade-offs.

edge.task_service_logic: Minimal implementation with explicit TODOs for error handling and tests.
edge.task_architecture_note: Focuses on one constraint and omits alternatives.
